svg.title: Doctor foreign core.hooksPath terminal output
svg.desc: A terminal-style warning box saying core.hooksPath points at a directory the tool does not manage, with the commands to add there.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: git core.hooksPath is set to githooks, so git only

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: runs hooks from that directory. Add these commands there:

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Or unset it to use native .git/hooks wiring:

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
